title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at UltraTech Cement

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at UltraTech Cement
jsonLd.description:
We at UltraTech Cement are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About UltraTech Cement:
UltraTech Cement is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UltraTech Cement!
